reasoning: Although the composite fidelity score is high (0.88), the low structural score (0.68) and shingling recall (0.845) corroborate the reported loss of specific data within nested lists. The omitted content includes jurisdiction readiness statuses and demographic statistics (population and land mass) which are critical for a government technical agenda, making this more than a cosmetic failure.

concerns.analysis: There are significant reading order defects. On Page 6, the reading order is reversed: text elements such as the chart caption (element 40), map link (element 41), and project notes (elements 42-44) appear before the images they describe (elements 45-46), which are physically at the top and middle of the page in the source. Additionally, on Page 7, there are gaps in the reading order sequence (missing elements 48 and 51), which correspond to missing content blocks (URLs).
